violations.text: The food prep sink in the kitchen was observed in poor repair (cold water not connected). A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The floors and walls in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as pasta) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Chicken was observed held at 45-57 degrees Fahrenheit in the cold well. The chicken was observed stored in the container above the cold rim of the unit over night. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Various food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Various items were observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of items at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Working containers (spray bottle of sanitizer) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The grease trap was observed to be leaking onto the floor in the kitchen. Equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. At the time of inspection, area was cleaned and service/maintenance was contacted. PIC to notify inspector once equipment was been serviced/replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2022

The non-food contact surfaces of the interior and exterior of the flip top prep unit and the external surfaces of the cold draws have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The food prep sink in the kitchen was observed in poor repair (cold water not connected). A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The floors and walls in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
